name: Village of Euclid v. Ambler Realty Company
question: Did the village of Euclid's zoning ordinance violate Ambler Realty's rights to liberty and property under the Due Process and Equal Protection Clauses of the Fourteenth Amendment?
description: A case in which the Court held that a Euclid, Ohio, zoning ordinance was not an unreasonable extension of the village's police power and was not arbitrary, and thus it did not violate the Due Process and Equal Protection Clauses of the Fourteenth Amendment.
